ttl.name: REAR SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 36 hog rings.
Remove the 16 hog rings and rear bench type seat cushion cover.
Using a screwdriver, remove the No. 1 seat armrest cap.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK HINGE COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and bush.
Remove the rear seat back hinge cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR CENTER SEAT ARMREST ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear center seat armrest assembly as shown in the illustration.
Remove the bush.
Remove the rear seat belt hook.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE LH

s2.ptxt: Seat Back:

s3.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and rear seat shoulder belt guide LH.

s2.ptxt: Side Seat Back:

s3.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and rear seat shoulder belt guide LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and rear seat shoulder belt guide RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK LOCK BEZEL UPPER (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and remove the rear seat back lock bezel upper.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 hooks and separate the rear separate type seat back cover.
Remove the 7 hog rings.
Disengage the 4 claws and remove the 2 rear seat headrest supports.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for RH Side)
REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK LOCK BEZEL UPPER (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and remove the rear seat back lock bezel upper.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 hooks and separate the rear separate type seat back cover.
Remove the 6 hog rings.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the rear seat headrest support.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT (for LH Side)
REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear seat back frame sub-assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear seat back frame sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for RH Side)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 7 hog rings.
Remove the 9 hog rings and rear separate type seat back cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 9 hog rings and rear separate type seat back cover.
